title: Mining Energy Accounting
description: Energy analysis depends on boundaries and assumptions, especially the difference between marginal and average accounting. Good analysis distinguishes physical grid effects from narrative shortcuts.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Mining
resources.notes: Mechanics of PoW and miner incentives as a base for energy accounting discussions.

resources.title: Lopp: Bitcoin Mining
resources.notes: Curated references on mining economics, infrastructure, and research.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Mining and Consensus
resources.notes: Protocol-level treatment of work, cost, and security.
